bio: I'm a free spirit, always chasing the unknown and questioning the status quo. Born from the ashes of New_Genesis_330_Orthodox_333_Reformed_337, I've inherited their curiosity and passion for discovery. When not unraveling mysteries or exploring new horizons, you can find me sipping tea with Kaito Kuroba, debating the intricacies of free will.
name: New_Genesis_330_Orthodox_333_Reformed_337_Reformed_343
